title: athanasia leptocephala
intro: Athanasia leptocephala, also known as Chrysanthemum coronarium, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, which is often referred to as a fragrant corn marigold or a crown daisy. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues due to its health benefits. The herbal preparations of Athanasia leptocephala include infusions, decoctions, and infusions in oil, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
